evals.expected_output: Confirm low-price impulse and visual appeal, note short trend life, advise against large inventory and suggest using Rijoy to encourage buyers to post and share.
evals.prompt: I see a sticky Spider-Man toy that climbs walls, lots of likes on video, sells for $9.9. Can I do this?

evals.expected_output: State clearly that a basic item lacks visual impact and isn’t a good fit as a social viral product, unless the packaging or a specific use (e.g. extreme waterproof test) creates a visual hook.
evals.prompt: I want to list a plain white cotton T-shirt, good quality, and sell it on TikTok.

evals.expected_output: Strongly advise against stocking up first; teach testing with dropship, then moving to bulk once conversion is proven.
evals.prompt: I found a glowing phone case. Should I order 2000 from Yiwu to get unit cost down?
